name: Best Rhubarb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugars and shortening together.
2. Add eggs to the mixture.
3. Mix flour, salt, vanilla, and cinnamon.
4. Dissolve vinegar and baking soda in milk.
5. Alternately add dry ingredients to the sugar mixture with the milk mixture.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Combine topping ingredients by mixing brown sugar, cinnamon, and chopped nuts.
8. Sprinkle the topping over the batter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
